allow: Bash(node -e "const l = require\(''lucide-react''\); console.log\(Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''tube''\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''video''\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''play''\)\).slice\(0,20\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const l = require\(''lucide-react''\); const names = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => /^[A-Z]/.test\(k\) && !k.includes\(''Icon''\) && !k.includes\(''Lucide''\)\); const social = names.filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''facebook''\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''instagram''\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''linkedin''\)\); console.log\(social\)")
